title: Thaiboy Digital & swedm® Announce New Album Paradise: Hear Two Tracks
author: Abby Jones
summary:

The post Thaiboy Digital & swedm® Announce New Album <em>Paradise</em>: Hear Two Tracks appeared first on Stereogum.
full_text:
Thaiboy Digital hasn't released an album of his own in four years, though he has collaborated here and there with his fellow Drain Gang affiliates: Over the past couple of years the Thailand-born rapper/producer has appeared on projects like Bladee's Cold Visions and the compilation album Rift Two. Meanwhile, Thaiboy Digital is also one of the many members of swedm®, a Drain Gang-adjacent electronic music collective that includes Bladee, Whitearmor, Eurohead, Jamesjamesjames, and Skrillex, to name a few. You may have heard swedm®'s production across many tracks on Skrillex's album from last year.

Today Thaiboy Digital announced Paradise, his new album made with the folks of swedm®. It's out in May from Thaiboy's own label Bank Of Star Sound System (B.O.S.S.S.). Paradise include last week's slick, synth-heavy single "Silk Road" as well as today's new one "Euro Dollar Yen," a fun take on classic bass-thumping Eurodance. Idan Barazani directed moth music videos, which you can check out below.

TRACKLIST:
01 "Welcome To Paradise"
02 "Dreaming Your Reality"
03 "Solitary"
04 "Zatoichi"
05 "Come True"
06 "Euro Dollar Yen"
07 "Born Ready"
08 "Irish Tears" (Feat. Bladee)
09 "Christian Louboutin"
10 "Money Dance"
11 "Surrendering To The Rhythm"
12 "Silk Road"
13 "Destiny"

Paradise is out 5/10 via B.O.S.S.S.
